=Code generator=

The {{{ocsigen-i18n-generator}}} command reads a TSV file and
produces an Eliom source file ({{{.eliom}}}) containing the
translations as OCaml functions.

==Usage

{{{
ocsigen-i18n-generator [options] [< input] [> output]
}}}

==Options

|{{{--languages}}}|Comma-separated languages (e.g. {{{en,fr}}}). Must be ordered as in the TSV file.|
|{{{--default-language}}}|Set the default language (defaults to the first one in {{{--languages}}}).|
|{{{--input-file}}}|TSV file. If omitted or set to {{{-}}}, reads from stdin.|
|{{{--output-file}}}|Output file. If omitted or set to {{{-}}}, writes to stdout.|
|{{{--external-type}}}|Language values come from a predefined type (do not generate the type).|
|{{{--primary}}}|Generated file is secondary and depends on the given primary file.|

==Generated code

The generator produces:
* A type {{{t}}} with one constructor per language
* Functions {{{string_of_language}}}, {{{language_of_string}}}, and {{{guess_language_of_string}}}
* Language management functions using Eliom scoped references ({{{get_language}}}, {{{set_language}}})
* A module {{{Tr}}} containing HTML translation functions (using {{{Eliom_content.Html.F.txt}}})
* A module {{{S}}} (inside {{{Tr}}}) containing string translation functions

All definitions use Eliom shared sections ({{{let%shared}}}),
making them available on both server and client.

==Dune integration

Use a dune rule to generate the Eliom file from your TSV file:

{{{
(rule
 (target example_i18n.eliom)
 (deps example_i18n.tsv)
 (action
  (run %{bin:ocsigen-i18n-generator} --languages en,fr --input-file %{deps}
    --output-file %{target})))
}}}

==Using multiple TSV files

Use {{{--primary}}} to generate a secondary file that depends on
a primary one. The secondary file will reuse the type and utility
functions from the primary file:

{{{
ocsigen-i18n-generator --languages en,fr \
  --input-file main_i18n.tsv --output-file main_i18n.eliom
ocsigen-i18n-generator --languages en,fr \
  --primary main_i18n.eliom \
  --input-file extra_i18n.tsv --output-file extra_i18n.eliom
}}}
